'''dawungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uvularia|uvularia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-w-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uvularia|uvularia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dawungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæwingith|dæwingith]] || [[word:dæwingij|dæwingij]] || [[word:dæwingish|dæwingish]] || [[word:dæwingi|dæwingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dawuwunguth|dawuwunguth]] || [[word:dawuwunguj|dawuwunguj]] || [[word:dawuwungush|dawuwungush]] || [[word:dawuwungu|dawuwungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dawunguth|dawunguth]] || [[word:dawunguj|dawunguj]] || [[word:dawungush|dawungush]] || [[word:dawungu|dawungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dawufnguth|dawufnguth]] || [[word:dawufnguj|dawufnguj]] || [[word:dawufngush|dawufngush]] || [[word:dawufnguf|dawufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dawunguthu|dawunguthu]] || [[word:dawunguju|dawunguju]] || [[word:dawungushu|dawungushu]] || [[word:dawunguku|dawunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dawunguth|dawunguth]] || [[word:dawunguj|dawunguj]] || [[word:dawungush|dawungush]] || [[word:dawungu|dawungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dawunguthul|dawunguthul]] || [[word:dawungujul|dawungujul]] || [[word:dawungushul|dawungushul]] || [[word:dawungukul|dawungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dawunguthuthu|dawunguthuthu]] || [[word:dawungujuju|dawungujuju]] || [[word:dawungushushu|dawungushushu]] || [[word:dawunguku|dawunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dawunguthun|dawunguthun]] || [[word:dawungujun|dawungujun]] || [[word:dawungushun|dawungushun]] || [[word:dawungukun|dawungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dawunguthuoro|dawunguthuoro]] || [[word:dawungujuoro|dawungujuoro]] || [[word:dawungushuoro|dawungushuoro]] || [[word:dawungukuoro|dawungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
